steps.name: Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click on the first transaction from the table
Verify: The dialog box header has text 'Transaction details'
Verify: The dialog box section names

retries.statusDetails:

Received: [Amount, Updated on (GMT), NPGW reference, , Card details, Customer details, 3D Secure, Transaction lifecycle, Gateway, Merchant, ]
